title: Cobblemon: Ball Swap Minigame
description: Swap your pokemons balls with a small skillbased minigame.
body:
**Simply Shift+Rightclick your pokemon with ball in hand** to start the minigame
fail 3 times and your new ball is lost.
One success and your pokemon will be in the new ball.

Inspired by this gamma emerald mechanic
https://youtu.be/WJtUtxua1BI?t=11
